/usr/bin/ar qc libATDevices.a CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/blockdevwritefilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/computereyes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/corvus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/devices.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/dongle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/exeloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/loopback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/modemsound.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/netserial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/paralleltoserial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/parfilewriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/serialsplitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/sioclock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/supersalt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/testdevicesiohs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/testdevicesiopoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATDevices.dir/source/videogenerator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libATDevices.a
